samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="i">
            <description>Shift count register updated on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>Reset (rst_n == 0), set i to 0.</item>
                <item>Start (start == 1) and i less than 17, increment i by 1.</item>
                <item>Start (start == 0), set i to 0.</item>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="done">
            <description>Multiplication completion flag updated on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>Reset (rst_n == 0), set done_r to 0.</item>
                <item>i equals 16, set done_r to 1.</item>
                <item>i equals 17, set done_r to 0.</item>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic id="shift_acc">
            <description>Shift and accumulate operation performed when i is greater than 0 and the bit at position i-1 in the multiplicand register (areg) is high.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>i greater than 0 and i less than 17, and areg[i-1] is high.</item>
            </condition>
            <operation>
                <item>Update yout_r by adding the shifted value of breg by i-1 positions.</item>
            </operation>
        </combinational_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module performs unsigned 16-bit multiplication using shift and accumulate operations. 
    It maintains a shift count (i) to control the multiplication process and a completion flag (done_r) to indicate when the multiplication is done. 
    On each positive clock edge or negative reset edge, the shift count (i) is updated. 
    If the reset signal (rst_n) is low, i is set to 0. 
    If start is high and i is less than 17, i is incremented by 1. 
    If start is low, i is reset to 0.
    
    The multiplication completion flag (done_r) is updated on each positive clock edge or negative reset edge. 
    If rst_n is low, done_r is set to 0. 
    If i equals 16, done_r is set to 1, indicating that the multiplication is complete. 
    If i equals 17, done_r is reset to 0.
    
    The shift and accumulate operation is performed on each positive clock edge or negative reset edge. 
    If the reset signal (rst_n) is low, the multiplicand register (areg), multiplier register (breg), and product register (yout_r) are reset to 0. 
    If start is high, the multiplicand (ain) and multiplier (bin) are stored in the respective registers. 
    For values of i greater than 0 and less than 17, if the bit at position i-1 in the multiplicand register (areg) is high, the product register (yout_r) accumulates the shifted value of the multiplier register (breg) by shifting it left by i-1 positions and appending zeros at the least significant bit positions.
    </implementation>
</module>
